text:
Himoncé (ヒマンセ, Himanse) is one of five personal guards for Prince Tyson. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 375 Hunter × Hunter - Volume 38, Chapter 400 

Appearance

Himoncé has light-colored hair that falls past his ears and just above his eyes. He wears the usual black suit and tie of a bodyguard.

Personality

In his roleplaying as a global A-list star, Himoncé has a bubbly demeanor and is quick to praise Tyson's unique personality. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Himoncé is first seen when Tyson preaches from her Book of Tyson to all her staff. He is then seen performing in an acapella chorus with three other Tyson bodyguards at a Sunday banquet. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 383 

In Tyson's quarters, Himoncé happily introduces himself as a global A-list star. He refers to Tyson using a nickname and says that she had never heard of him and that he isn't her type according to her. He adds that he has never met anyone like her. After the rest of Tyson's bodyguards introduce themselves, Giuliano realizes that they are acting out the characters Tyson likes. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Given the description of a global A-list star, it is possible that Himoncé's name is a reference to singer and songwriter Beyoncé.
